positive: A stylized cosmic mural illustration featuring a majestic, glowing arctic fox howling at a twin moon backdrop. The fox should have clean, minimalist silhouettes and bright, ethereal blue and gold glows outlining its fur. The background combines deep nebula patterns (indigo, violet) with crystalline geometric celestial structures and stylized, interlocking constellations. The composition should be symmetrical and central, designed for a clean, repeatable repeat pattern look. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets mystical geometry, high contrast, vector aesthetic, smooth gradients, printed on a dark slate texture. Lighting: Cinematic, dramatic backlighting from the moon, giving depth to the silhouettes. Color palette: Indigo, midnight blue, ethereal cyan, sapphire, gold leaf accents.
negative: blurry, messy, realistic photo, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noise, jpeg artifacts
